description: 12-LAYER pre-trained baseline: perfect quality, slow (36 Metal + 36 ANE dispatches/token)
2-LAYER TRAINED (3330 steps on TinyStories): 284 tok/s EXCEEDS TARGET but quality poor (repeats 'Gro' after ~5 tokens). Loss still at 5.7 after 3330 steps — needs much more training.
4-LAYER TRAINED (1000 steps on TinyStories): 131 tok/s, quality degrades after ~20 tokens (repeats 'Him')
4-LAYER pre-trained (first 4 of 12 layers): 133 tok/s, immediate degeneration into 'redients' repetition
6-LAYER pre-trained (first 6 of 12 layers): 103 tok/s, quality degrades after ~20 tokens
12-LAYER + ESPRESSO_DISABLE_METAL_FUSED_SDPA=1: WORSE than baseline (63 vs 73). Fused SDPA helps for 12 layers.
12-LAYER + ESPRESSO_BATCHED_METAL_ATTENTION=1: WORSE than baseline (64 vs 73). Batching Metal loses pipelining overlap.

commit: CONCLUSION: Cannot achieve 250 tok/s with good quality via layer reduction alone.
- 2-layer trained (284 tok/s): poor quality, needs much more training
- 4-layer trained (131 tok/s): better but still degraded, needs more training
Remaining paths to 250 tok/s with quality:
1. Speculative decoding (draft model + verify with full model)
2. Full distillation training (4+ layer model, 50k+ steps on full TinyStories)
3. ANE kernel fusion (2-layer fused kernels — currently fails to compile)
